Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope

Class DefaultThreadConfiguration

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.DefaultThreadConfiguration
All Implemented Interfaces:
ThreadConfiguration
public final class DefaultThreadConfiguration extends Object implements ThreadConfiguration
Configures the behavior of all verifiers invoked by the current thread.
